analysis_layers.title: 阵容对位层

analysis_layers.title: 临场变量层
analysis_layers.summary: Late news, rest, travel and referee profile are handled as separate pressure rather than hidden inside one score.

analysis_layers.title: Venue Adaptation

analysis_layers.title: 市场背离层
analysis_layers.summary: Market track is unavailable, so the dual-track read cannot confirm or challenge fundamentals.
key_drivers: No market odds attached to this match evidence.

analysis_layers.title: 比赛剧本层
analysis_layers.summary: Base case: W89 倾向不败或取胜, reference score 2-1. The model edge is +4.8 after fundamentals and Tianji overlay.
key_drivers: Base case: W89 倾向不败或取胜, reference score 2-1. The model edge is +4.8 after fundamentals and Tianji overlay.
Counter case: W90 changes the read if lineup news improves, set pieces land, or the favorite is forced into a slow first half.
Draw case: already material because the model gap is narrow; game state and finishing variance matter.
watch_triggers: confirmed starting XI differs from roster-depth baseline
late injury or suspension changes the strongest positional unit
market probability moves against the model by more than 8 percentage points

analysis_layers.title: Scoreline Distribution
analysis_layers.summary: Exact score is modeled as a distribution, not a single certainty. Top branches: 2-1 (29%), 1-0 (24%), 2-0 (24%).
counter_signals: Cards, penalties, set pieces, and chase-game states can move the total-goals branch quickly.

analysis_layers.title: 反方审稿层
analysis_layers.summary: This layer records why the pick could be wrong before publishing the final entertainment call.
key_drivers: Final model edge +4.8 points toward W89 倾向不败或取胜.
counter_signals: new injury/lineup evidence changes the strongest positional edge
fresh odds imply a different market favorite
post-match calibration shows this confidence bucket underperforming
small model gap means a single major lineup change can flip the pick
blocked or partial evidence must be resolved before raising confidence
